title: GIS Chat for QGIS: AI-Powered Natural Language Assistant
description: GIS Chat for QGIS is an open-source plugin (Python/PyQt5) that embeds an LLM-powered chat panel directly inside QGIS. Users describe geospatial operations in natural language; the plugin injects live workspace context (layers, fields, CRS, selections) into the prompt and the LLM generates and executes PyQGIS/Processing code via structured tool calling. Zero external dependencies beyond the Python standard library. Supports five LLM providers including free options (Google Gemini, Ollama). Optional Google Earth Engine integration enables satellite data retrieval from the chat panel.
